form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up 3rd in a small field at this track on February 18 over 1308m, 5 len behind Zachamundo carrying 55.5kg at $7.10. Second run from a spell 4th in a small field at this track on March 11 over 1408m, 2.75 len behind Ray Of Sunshine with 55.5kg at $6.30. Forward showing expected.
